title: Bergen Heavy Rain
lead: Bergen is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of -4.63. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Bergen is causing significant disruptions. 
 The high humidity of 89% and low wind speed of 5.0 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 17.2 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG indicate a high demand for heating.
